universal_agent/api/routers/csi_watchlis.label: YouTube channel classifier
universal_agent/api/routers/csi_watchlis.description: Classifies a watchlist YouTube channel into one of ~10 taxonomy categories (one bounded label, max_tokens=100). Runs on add_channel + /reclassify; serialized to concurrency-1.
universal_agent/api/routers/csi_watchlis.notes: opus->sonnet 2026-06-13 (#982) — was the single largest 429 source (100% opus, ~67% reject).

universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.label: Convergence — cluster judge (batched)
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.description: Judges a CHUNK of ~20 candidate buckets in ONE structured-output call (verdict array keyed by bucket_id). The DEFAULT convergence judge call-site; each per-bucket verdict still passes the shared _gate_cluster_verdict precision gates.
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.notes: PR #989 (2026-06-13). A 61-bucket batch-size sweep found an inverted-U: ~20/call hits F1 0.84 at 4 calls vs per-bucket 0.78 at 61 — fewer CALLS (the throttle lever) AND better precision via cross-bucket comparative context. UA_CONVERGENCE_JUDGE_BATCH_SIZE (default 20; =1 reverts to _refine_cluster_with_llm).

universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.label: Convergence — cluster judge (legacy per-bucket)
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.description: Judges whether a SQL-recalled bucket of recent videos from different channels is a genuine converging theme. The legacy ONE-call-per-bucket path, used only when UA_CONVERGENCE_JUDGE_BATCH_SIZE=1; shares the _gate_cluster_verdict precision gate with the batched judge.
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.notes: opus->sonnet 2026-06-10 after a 30-bucket A/B: equal precision, ~35% faster, less FUP pressure. PR #989 (2026-06-13) extracted the shared gate and made batching the default — see _refine_clusters_batched. Validate tier changes with scripts/convergence_model_ab.py.

universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.label: Convergence — ideation/brief synthesis
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.description: Generative synthesis over the FULL recent CSI signature corpus in ONE call (up to UA_IDEATION_MAX_CORPUS, default 120; UA_IDEATION_MAX_TOKENS, default 8000). The 'Track B' ideation sweep that feeds Atlas's evaluate-and-author-intel-brief.
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.notes: On opus/flagship by DEFAULT (Tier C, project_docs 14_model_tiering_by_process) — high-value engine for non-obvious cross-cutting trends. As of 2026-06-14 it runs as a single new-content-gated whole-corpus call (was 3x20 recency batches), cutting its opus volume ~96%; the prior ~70% throttle is addressed by removing redundant volume, NOT by downgrading. Escape hatch: UA_IDEATION_MODEL moves it off opus with no deploy.

universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.label: Convergence — candidate triage
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.description: Triages CSI candidates for convergence/ideation eligibility (max_tokens=400). Cheap recall filter ahead of the judge.
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.notes: Driven by triage_candidate (resolve_haiku). Index bounded to UA_INTEL_TRIAGE_INDEX_MAX_CHARS (default 12000) after a 100K-token bloat incident. Graded-judge redesign: forwards an optional temperature (UA_INTEL_TRIAGE_TEMPERATURE / UA_LLM_JUDGE_TEMPERATURE) for determinism; when UA_INTEL_TRIAGE_SHIP_THRESHOLD is set the gate scores 0-100 instead of emitting a categorical verdict (default unset = categorical, inert).

universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.label: Convergence — topic signature extraction
universal_agent/services/proactive_conve.description: Extracts a compact topic signature from candidate text (max_tokens=900) used for clustering/dedup.

universal_agent/services/mission_control.label: Mission Control — Chief of Staff readout
universal_agent/services/mission_control.description: Synthesizes the operator-facing Mission Control readout from system state. Direct messages.create (not the classifier seam).
universal_agent/services/mission_control.notes: Dedicated glm-4.7 lane (2026-06-12 consolidation). Up-to-3x retry on an ~18k-token prompt — a retry-multiplier watch target.

universal_agent/services/mission_control.label: Mission Control — Tier-1 card discovery
universal_agent/services/mission_control.description: Discovers Tier-1 priority cards from recent system signals. Direct messages.create.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Task priority classifier
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Classifies a task/communication into a priority tier. Bounded label.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Agent routing classifier
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Routes a task to the appropriate VP/agent rather than defaulting to Simone. Bounded label.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Calendar task description generator
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Generates a short human description for a calendar-derived task.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Due-date extractor
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Extracts a structured due-at timestamp from free text.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Disjointed-task extractor
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Extracts multiple discrete tasks from a single unstructured message.

universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..label: Tutorial buildability judge
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..description: Binary buildable/not judgment for a tutorial candidate.
universal_agent/services/llm_classifier..notes: Binary judgment — haiku tier intentional (UA_TUTORIAL_BUILDABILITY_MODEL). Graded-judge redesign: forwards an optional temperature (UA_TUTORIAL_BUILD_TEMPERATURE / UA_LLM_JUDGE_TEMPERATURE) for determinism; when UA_TUTORIAL_BUILD_THRESHOLD is set the judge scores 0-100 and buildable = score >= threshold (set HIGH to suppress false positives). Default unset = binary, inert.

universal_agent/services/proactive_work_.label: Proactive work-recap evaluator
universal_agent/services/proactive_work_.description: Evaluates proactive work recaps for quality/usefulness (max_tokens=900).
universal_agent/services/proactive_work_.notes: Defaults to opus (UA_PROACTIVE_RECAP_LLM_MODEL or resolve_opus). Evaluation/judgment task — likely sonnet-able like the convergence judge; candidate for an opus->sonnet A/B.

universal_agent/services/session_dossier.label: Session dossier generator
universal_agent/services/session_dossier.description: Generates a session dossier summary. Direct messages.create, haiku tier.

universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_ent.label: Wiki — entity extraction
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_ent.description: Extracts named entities from wiki source material.
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_ent.notes: opus->sonnet 2026-06-13: routed through _extract_model() (UA_WIKI_EXTRACT_MODEL, default sonnet). Bounded structured extraction — was on the opus default unnecessarily. PR #1000: heuristic fallback shared via _heuristic_entities; high-volume packet path now batches via extract_facets_batched.

universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_con.label: Wiki — concept extraction
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_con.description: Extracts key concepts/topics from wiki source material.
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::extract_con.notes: opus->sonnet 2026-06-13: routed through _extract_model() (UA_WIKI_EXTRACT_MODEL, default sonnet). Bounded structured extraction — was on the opus default unnecessarily. PR #1000: high-volume packet path now batches via extract_facets_batched.

universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::generate_su.label: Wiki — summary generation
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::generate_su.description: Generates a prose summary for a wiki entity/topic.
universal_agent/wiki/llm.py::generate_su.notes: wiki/llm._call_llm defaults to opus. Generative (1-3 sentence summary) — kept on opus while the extraction siblings moved to sonnet (2026-06-13); verify it needs flagship quality. PR #1000: batched packet path keeps summary on its own opus call (extract_facets_batched) rather than downgrading it.

universal_agent/discord_intelligence/rel.label: Discord intel — relevance filter (batch)
universal_agent/discord_intelligence/rel.description: Batch-classifies discord intelligence items for relevance. Small prompts (~26 in / 32 out observed), haiku tier.

universal_agent/discord_intelligence/tri.label: Discord intel — triage (batch)
universal_agent/discord_intelligence/tri.description: Batch-triages discord intelligence items into action lanes. Direct messages.create.

universal_agent/backlog_triage.py::_synt.label: Backlog triage — synthesis
universal_agent/backlog_triage.py::_synt.description: Synthesizes a triage decision/summary over the task backlog (max_tokens=1500).

universal_agent/scripts/youtube_daily_di.label: YouTube daily digest — ZAI calls (map + reduce)
universal_agent/scripts/youtube_daily_di.description: Retry-wrapped ZAI calls for the daily digest: the per-video MAP step (glm-4.5-air/haiku, high fan-out) and the final REDUCE/synthesis (opus). Once-daily batch.
universal_agent/scripts/youtube_daily_di.notes: Map step (glm-4.5-air, per-video fan-out) observed ~83% 429 over 12h — a CONCURRENCY-burst throttle, NOT a tier issue; lower map concurrency / pace (UA_YOUTUBE_DIGEST_*). Reduce step on opus (single call, defensible).

universal_agent/services/proactive_intel.label: Proactive intelligence report — reasoning
universal_agent/services/proactive_intel.description: Lightweight reasoning over period stats for the proactive intelligence report (max_tokens=700).
